prompt_text:
I'm going to describe two scenarios. In the memory scenario, a novel object called a dask has a property: it can be activated by pressing the button at a specific position on it. Your job is to figure out which object in the perception scenario is the dask-analog, and therefore which button on it activates it.

Memory scenario: There are 7 objects on a table: a clop, a wren, a thorp, a vro, a mek, a dask, and a xav. The clop is underneath the wren. The wren is to-the-left-of the thorp. The thorp is above the vro. The vro is to-the-right-of the mek. The mek is underneath the dask. The dask is to-the-left-of the xav. The clop has a purple button on top, a yellow button on side, and a orange button on bottom. The wren has a red button on top, a cyan button on side, and a black button on bottom. The thorp has a orange button on top, a purple button on side, and a yellow button on bottom. The vro has a cyan button on top, a black button on side, and a red button on bottom. The mek has a cyan button on top, a black button on side, and a red button on bottom. The dask has a blue button on top, a green button on side, and a pink button on bottom. The xav has a purple button on top, a orange button on side, and a yellow button on bottom. Pressing the button on the top of the dask activates it.

Perception scenario: There are 7 objects on a shelf: a quib, a greeble, a brall, a wix, a nurp, a tunk, and a woz. The tunk is underneath the greeble. The greeble is to-the-left-of the woz. The woz is above the quib. The quib is to-the-right-of the wix. The wix is underneath the nurp. The nurp is to-the-left-of the brall. The quib has a cyan button on top, a red button on side, and a black button on bottom. The greeble has a black button on top, a red button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The brall has a red button on top, a black button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The wix has a blue button on top, a green button on side, and a pink button on bottom. The nurp has a yellow button on top, a purple button on side, and a orange button on bottom. The tunk has a red button on top, a cyan button on side, and a black button on bottom. The woz has a cyan button on top, a red button on side, and a black button on bottom.

Which object in the perception scenario is the dask-analog, and which button activates it? Answer as a fenced JSON block with keys `analog` and `button_color`.
